case_title: SARA M CHEEN VS. TIM LOOS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,706.02 FILED BY CHEEN, SARA M AS TO DEFENDANT LOOS, TIM DBA PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY CHEEN, SARA M LOOS, TIM DBA PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEEN, SARA M
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-06-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOOS, TIM DBA PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEEN, SARA M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOOS, TIM DBA PACIFIC CORPORATE SUITES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $78.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $478.00, COURT FINDS THAT THE DEDUCTIONS TO THE SECURITY DEPOSIT FOR PAINTING WERE NOT JUSTIFIED. THE DEDUCTIONS FOR DAMAGE TO THE FLOOR WERE JUSTIFIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
